entities.name: B07 – Tone and Context

entities.name: Legitimacy and Competence
entities.context: Unspoken theme where both founders implicitly check whether their approaches are good enough in each other's eyes.

entities.name: Peer-to-Peer Founder Dynamic
entities.context: Non-hierarchical dynamic between two founders comparing notes rather than a mentor/mentee setup.

relationships.context: Peer founders with high mutual respect, sharing vulnerable details about their businesses.
